data.body:
Goal:
Validate and normalize knot ID references in execution_plan payloads on write. Accept both bare IDs (e.g., "a873") and fully-qualified IDs (e.g., "foolery-a873") as input, but always canonicalize to the fully-qualified form before persisting. Display should always show fully-qualified IDs.

Verification:
1. Writing an execution_plan payload with bare knot IDs (e.g., "a873") stores them as fully-qualified (e.g., "foolery-a873").
2. Writing with already-qualified IDs passes through unchanged.
3. Writing with an ID that doesn't resolve to any known knot produces a warning or error.
4. kno show --json always displays fully-qualified knot IDs in knot_ids arrays at all levels (top-level, wave, step).

Constraints:
- Apply to all knot_ids fields in the execution_plan schema (top-level, per-wave, per-step).
- Do not silently drop unresolvable IDs — warn or reject.
- Keep backward compatibility: existing payloads with bare IDs should still load, but normalize on next write.
data.title: Normalize knot ID references in execution_plan payloads
